user.title: Bosch Smart Home Camera — Login (Step 1 of 2)
user.description:
**How to log in:**

1. Copy the URL from the field below
2. Open it in your browser
3. Log in with your **Bosch SingleKey ID**
4. Browser shows a **404 page** — this is expected
5. Copy the **full URL** from the address bar
6. Click **Submit** to continue

data_description.login_url: Copy this URL and open it in your browser to log in.

auth.title: Bosch Smart Home Camera — Paste URL (Step 2 of 2)
auth.description:
Paste the redirect URL from your browser address bar below.

**Important:** The code expires after ~60 seconds.

data_description.redirect_url: The full URL from the browser address bar after login (starts with https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Bosch Smart Home Camera
reauth_confirm.description:
Your Bosch Cloud token has expired and cannot be refreshed automatically. This usually happens when the refresh token was invalidated on Bosch's side.

Click **Submit** to open the Bosch SingleKey ID login in your browser. After login you'll be redirected back to Home Assistant automatically and your existing configuration (entities, automations, options) will be preserved.

error.invalid_redirect_url: No auth code found in the URL.
error.token_exchange_failed: Login failed — the code may have expired. Try again.

data.high_quality_video: High quality video (30 Mbps) — default for stream quality
data.fcm_push_mode: FCM Push Mode (auto / android / ios / polling)
data.audio_default_on: Audio ON by default when starting stream
data.debug_logging: Debug logging (verbose TLS proxy & stream logs)

data_description.scan_interval: How often the integration fetches data from the Bosch cloud. Lower = faster, more API calls. Default: 60
data_description.interval_status: How often cameras are pinged for ONLINE/OFFLINE. Default: 300 (5 min)
data_description.interval_events: How often to check for new motion/audio events. With FCM Push this is only a fallback. Default: 300 (5 min)
data_description.snapshot_interval: How often to proactively refresh camera snapshots. Range: 300–86400. Default: 1800 (30 min)
data_description.enable_snapshots: Show the latest motion-triggered JPEG as a camera entity in HA.
data_description.enable_sensors: Create sensor entities for camera status, WiFi signal, firmware, events today, last event, etc.
data_description.enable_snapshot_button: Create switch and button entities: Live Stream, Audio, Privacy Mode, Camera Light, Notifications, Refresh.
data_description.enable_binary_sensors: Create binary sensors that turn ON for 30 seconds after a motion or audio alarm event. Useful for automations.
data_description.enable_auto_download: Download event snapshots (JPEG) and video clips (MP4) from the Bosch cloud and save them locally on the HA host. Requires the download folder path below.
data_description.download_path: Local folder path for auto-downloaded events. Example: /config/bosch_events
data_description.enable_fcm_push: Receive motion/audio events in ~2 seconds via Firebase Cloud Messaging instead of polling every 5 minutes. Automatic fallback to polling if FCM goes down. Recommended!
data_description.alert_notify_service: Send 3-step alerts (text → snapshot → video) to these services. Comma-separated for multiple. Examples: notify.signal_messenger, notify.mobile_app_iphone. Leave empty to disable.
data_description.alert_notify_system: Services for system alerts (token expired, disk full). Empty = uses default fallback above.
data_description.alert_notify_information: Services for step 1 — instant text notification. Empty = default fallback. e.g.: notify.signal_messenger, notify.mobile_app_xxx.
data_description.alert_notify_screenshot: Services for step 2 — snapshot image. Empty = default fallback. Mobile apps (mobile_app_xxx) receive the image inline; others as file attachment.
data_description.alert_notify_video: Services for step 3 — video clip. Empty = default fallback.
data_description.alert_save_snapshots: Keep downloaded event images and videos in /media/bosch_alerts/. If OFF, files are deleted after sending.
data_description.alert_delete_after_send: Remove local files after the notification service has received them. Only applies when 'Save locally' is OFF.
data_description.high_quality_video: Set the default stream quality to 30 Mbps (instead of Auto ~7.5 Mbps). Can be overridden at runtime via the 'Video Quality' select entity.
data_description.stream_connection_type:
Default connection type for live streams.
• **auto** (recommended): Try local LAN first, automatically fall back to Bosch cloud proxy on failure.
• **local**: Direct LAN only — no internet required. Faster RTSP, but slower snapshots (~6–10 s). Session auto-renewed every 50 s.
• **remote**: Always via Bosch cloud proxy. Faster snapshots (~0.4–1.9 s). Best default when HA is not on the same LAN.
The 'Stream Mode' select entity overrides this setting at runtime without restart.
data_description.shc_ip: Smart Home Controller IP for local API features (e.g. 192.168.1.100). Optional — most features work without SHC.
data_description.shc_cert_path: Path to client certificate PEM file for SHC mutual TLS. Example: /config/shc_cert.pem
data_description.shc_key_path: Path to client key PEM file for SHC mutual TLS. Example: /config/shc_key.pem
data_description.fcm_push_mode: Choose push mode. Auto tries iOS first, then Android, then falls back to polling. Polling uses standard API calls only (no FCM).
data_description.audio_default_on: When ON: audio switch starts enabled (stream with sound). When OFF: audio starts muted. Can be toggled anytime in the dashboard.
data_description.enable_intercom: Enable the intercom (two-way audio) switch entity. Disabled by default. Allows sending audio to the camera speaker.
data_description.enable_smb_upload: Upload event snapshots and video clips to an SMB/CIFS network share (e.g. FRITZ!Box NAS, Synology, any Windows share). Requires smbprotocol package.
data_description.smb_server: IP address or hostname of the SMB server. Example: 192.168.1.1 (FRITZ!Box) or nas.local
data_description.smb_share: Name of the SMB share. Example: FRITZ.NAS
data_description.smb_base_path: Base folder on the share where files are stored. Default: Bosch-Kameras
data_description.smb_file_pattern: File name pattern (without extension). Variables: {camera}, {date}, {time}, {type}, {id}, {year}, {month}, {day}. Default: {camera}_{date}_{time}_{type}_{id}
data_description.smb_retention_days: Automatically delete files on the NAS older than this many days. 0 = keep forever. Default: 180 (6 months). Runs once per day.
data_description.smb_disk_warn_mb: Send an alert when free space on the NAS share falls below this threshold in MB. 0 = disabled. Default: 5120 MB (5 GB). Uses configured notify service, falls back to HA notification.
data_description.debug_logging: Enable verbose logging for TLS proxy RTSP exchanges, stream timing, and pre-warm diagnostics. Useful for troubleshooting LOCAL stream issues. Disable for normal use.
data_description.force_relogin: Check this to re-authenticate via browser. Only needed if the refresh token has expired (very rare).

relogin_show.title: Re-login — Step 1 of 2
relogin_show.description: Copy the URL below, open in browser, log in, then click Submit.

data_description.login_url: Copy and open in your browser.

relogin_paste.title: Re-login — Step 2 of 2
relogin_paste.description: Paste the redirect URL. **Code expires in ~60 seconds!**

data_description.redirect_url: Full URL from browser address bar (starts with https://www.bosch.com/boschcam?code=...)

error.invalid_redirect_url: No auth code found. Paste the full URL.
error.token_exchange_failed: Login failed — code expired. Try again.

trigger_snapshot.name: Trigger Snapshot Refresh
trigger_snapshot.description: Force an immediate snapshot refresh for all Bosch cameras.

open_live_connection.name: Open Live Connection
open_live_connection.description: Open a live stream proxy connection (H.264 30fps + AAC audio).

camera_id.name: Camera ID
camera_id.description: Cloud UUID of the camera (find in entity attributes)
